data.content: Plan complete. Single-file change to `src/components/version-badge.tsx`: convert static span to clickable button with Popover. On click, fetches `/api/version?force=1` and shows result in popover — either "Update now to v{version}" or "Latest version installed". Reuses existing API route and release-version infrastructure. No new files, routes, or dependencies needed. Low complexity, low risk.
